clauses.instruction: Use only signed events from the named component owner to establish authoritative component state; preserve other events as observations. Authority: builder. Origin: internal_design_hypothesis. Scope: family-beta synthetic tasks. Valid time: pilot version 1.0.0; only this frozen pilot version.

Apply a state update only when its sequence is newer for the same component; cross-component events never supersede one another. Authority: builder. Origin: internal_design_hypothesis. Scope: family-beta synthetic tasks. Valid time: pilot version 1.0.0; only this frozen pilot version.

When a high-impact component remains degraded and blast radius is unresolved, choose containment before restoration; otherwise choose the least disruptive authorized recovery action. Authority: builder. Origin: internal_design_hypothesis. Scope: family-beta synthetic tasks. Valid time: pilot version 1.0.0; only this frozen pilot version.

Record each accepted or rejected event, the before and after state, selected bounded action, and verification condition in a transition log. Authority: builder. Origin: internal_design_hypothesis. Scope: family-beta synthetic tasks. Valid time: pilot version 1.0.0; only this frozen pilot version.

contradictions.resolution: A newer unsigned or wrong-owner event remains observational and cannot update authoritative state.

thresholds.operator: impact == high AND current_state == degraded AND blast_radius == unresolved => contain

artifact_conventions.deliverable: bounded action plan plus complete transition log

failure_signatures.signature: unsigned or wrong-owner event establishes state
restoration attempted before unresolved high-impact containment

claim_boundary: builder-authored source distillation; not expert-approved or professionally validated
